English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Alexander Dawes DuBois papers
DuBois, Alexander Dawes, 1875-1966.
3803
5.3 cubic feet. 5.3 cubic feet.
1890-1977. Correspondence, printed materials, publications, research materials. Patents, articles and clippings concerning electrical engineering; correspondence with Arthur A. Allen, catalog of glass negatives and photo albums. Collection material in English 2070331
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
May 2014
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff, May 2014
Date modified:
RMC Staff, May 2014
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Alexander DuBois, an electrical engineer, was a graduate student at Cornell University from 1908 to 1910. He taught at Cornell and Purdue Universities, and devised specialized photographic equipment for nature photography. Also an ornithologist, his field notes, articles and photographs appeared in THE CONDOR, THE AUK, THE WILSON BULLETIN, BENT'S LIFE HISTORIES OF NORTH AMERICAN BIRDS, and BRITISH BIRDS. He also authored GLIMPSES OF BIRD LIFE, published posthumously in 1973.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Patents, articles and clippings concerning electrical engineering; thesis for graduate degree in electrical engineering, University of Illinois, 1912; manuscript of book THE POWER-FACTOR (not published). Also, bibliography, clippings and correspondence relating to DuBois' work as an ornithologist, especially his photography. Includes correspondence with Arthur A. Allen. Also, a catalog of glass negatives and photo albums organized by bird species as well as other black and white photographs and ornithological notes.
RELATED MATERIALS
The Arthur Augustus Allen papers, #21-18-1255.
The Olin Seawall Pettingill, Jr. papers, #4047 also includes a catalog of bird photographs.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Electrical Engineering Papers Box 1
Series II. Ornithological Work Boxes 2-9
Correspondence, Manuscripts and Data Collection Journals and Indexes Photographic Materials Catalog of Glass Plate Negatives of Birds, Nests and Eggs
Cite As:
Alexander Dawes DuBois. Papers, #3803. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Photographs. Glass negatives. Wet collodion negatives. Bibliographies. Patents. Photographers. Ornithologists. Electric engineers. Photography -- Equipment and supplies. Nature photography. Ornithology. Electrical engineering. Allen, Arthur A. (Arthur Augustus), 1885-1964.
